message:
fix(lint): resolve 7 lint errors from stricter eslint-config-next 16.1.6 rules

The eslint-config-next 16.1.6 upgrade introduced two new react-hooks
rules (set-state-in-effect, immutability) and enforced existing rules
more strictly. All fixes are minimal and targeted:

1. glow-orbits.tsx: Added eslint-disable for setIsMounted(true) inside
   useEffect — this is a standard hydration-safety pattern where the
   component needs to know it has mounted on the client.

2. header-icon-3d.tsx: Added eslint-disable for pos.needsUpdate = true
   inside useFrame — Three.js requires mutating BufferAttribute flags
   to signal GPU re-upload; this is not a React state mutation.

3. notable-stargazers.tsx: Removed unused module-level const
   isStargazerDataStale (dead code, never referenced). Added
   eslint-disable for setIsStale() inside useEffect — computes
   staleness from static data on mount, legitimate one-time sync.

4. three-scene.tsx: Removed unnecessary 'seed' from useMemo dependency
   array — 'rand' (a seeded PRNG) already captures the seed value,
   so listing seed separately was redundant.

5. hooks/use-click-particles.ts: Prefixed module-level counter
   activeHookCount → _activeHookCount to satisfy no-unused-vars.
   The variable is incremented/decremented for reference counting
   but its value is never read (kept for future cleanup logic).

6. lib/github-stats.ts: Prefixed unused interface GitHubRepo →
   _GitHubRepo (defined but never referenced in current code).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
